injuries.comment: The Devils said on Friday (Dec. 12) that Gritsyuk will miss both games this weekend.
The Devils said that Nemec sustained an injury during Friday's (Dec. 12) practice and will miss some time, per Amanda Stein of the team's official site.
The Cancucks said that Hoglander is battling an illness on Saturday (Dec. 13), per Thomas Drance of The Athletic.
